_comment: Official PakMan package registry. All packages are hosted at github.com/udahar/. Only udahar repos are trusted by the security layer â€” this is not user-configurable.

PromptSKLib.description: 26 reusable AI reasoning skills and strategy scaffolds. Injected into task briefs automatically.

PromptForge.description: A/B prompt testing and prompt evolution pipeline. Benchmark prompts against each other.

PromptOS.description: Prompt runtime with memory, routing, and state management.

GapMan.description: Gap analysis engine. Finds what your model can't do yet and generates targeted hard tests.

tickets.description: Lightweight ticket and task tracker for AI workflows.

prompt_version_control.description: Git-style version control for prompts. Diff, branch, and roll back prompts.

tool_composer.description: Compose multiple tools into pipelines. Chain tool calls with routing and fallback.

Alfred.rust.description: 48 Rust utility crates for high-performance AI infrastructure (fs_scan, file_hash, http_get, etc.).

AutoCode.description: Automated code generation pipeline. Task â†’ brief â†’ code â†’ validate â†’ commit.

OllamaOps.description: Shared Ollama host control primitives for start, stop, restart, and status.

OllamaGuard.description: Shared stuck-state recovery bridge and launcher for Ollama-backed apps.

OllamaProxy.description: Shared local Ollama reverse-proxy and queue server extracted from OllamaBot.

OllamaBotApp.description: Parent bundle that composes the full OllamaBot app stack from PakMan modules.

AiOSKernel.description: Core kernel for AI operating system primitives â€” process model, memory model, I/O model.

apikey.description: Secure API key management. Store, rotate, and scope API keys for AI services.

blueprints.description: Project and app blueprints. Templates for common AI app patterns, pre-wired with PakMan.

Claw.description: Thin CLI wrapper for Alfred AI platform.

LinkedIn_Export.description: Import your LinkedIn connections into Qdrant for intelligent network search and relationship mapping.

LoRA.description: LoRA fine-tuning modules for Alfred platform models. Training scripts, datasets, and adapter management for local Ollama models.

MLStack.description: Shared ML environment: PyTorch, TensorFlow, ONNX, PEFT, DSPy, and accelerate. Installs to ~/.pakman/venvs/ml — shared across FieldBench and other consumers.

PakHealth.description: System wellness dashboard for PakMan. Monitors package health, import status, and dependency integrity across your installed set.

ProjMan.description: CLI tools for Alfred ProjectManager integration. Create and query projects, epics, stories, and tickets from the command line.

PromptRouter.description: Experimental prompt routing layer. Selects the optimal prompt strategy and target model based on task type and available capacity.

RomAI.description: Token and vendor orchestrator: budget enforcement, circuit breaking, and cost optimization.

StockAI.description: AI-powered stock analysis. Loads historical price data via yfinance, identifies patterns, and generates LLM-assisted investment recommendations.

SupDoc.description: Runtime documentation engine for the Alfred ecosystem. Self-documents installed capabilities and generates live API references.

WikiPak.description: Unified documentation generator. Reads every installed package README and builds a searchable Zola static site. Powers `pakman wiki`.

ZolaPress.description: Documentation and site generation utilities for ZolaPress static sites. Bridges PakMan package content into the ZolaPress CMS.

BenchmarkArena.description: Benchmark arena for head-to-head model evaluation. Run, score, and compare model performance.

BrowserMemory.description: Browser-based persistent memory. Stores and retrieves context across sessions using IndexedDB.

ContextCache.description: Lightweight caching layer for LLM context. Avoids redundant re-computation of expensive context windows.

ContextDistiller.description: Context distillation engine. Compresses long context windows into dense, relevant summaries.

ContextManager.description: Smart context window manager. Tracks token budgets and prioritizes content for optimal LLM performance.

CostOptimizer.description: Token cost optimizer. Routes tasks to cheapest capable model and enforces per-task spend limits.

Council.description: Multi-agent debate council. Routes a question through multiple models and synthesizes a consensus answer.

Courtroom.description: Code review loop. Iterates generated code through a judge-model until quality gates pass.

EvalFramework.description: Evaluation framework. Define metrics, run benchmarks, and compare model outputs systematically.

ModelRouter.description: Intelligent model router. Selects the best model for each task based on capability, cost, and latency.

MultiModelOrchestrator.description: Multi-model orchestrator. Fans out tasks across multiple models and merges results.

PromptEvolution.description: Prompt evolution engine. Generates prompt variants, benchmarks them, and promotes winners.

PromptLibrary.description: Searchable prompt library. Tag, version, and retrieve prompts by task type or keyword.

RecursiveContext.description: Recursive context builder. Assembles context from nested documents with depth control.

Scheduler.description: Task scheduler for AI workflows. Cron-like scheduling with dependency tracking and retries.

SkillComposer.description: Skill composer. Chain multiple skills into DAG pipelines with branching and fallback.

SkillEvolver.description: Skill evolver. Tests skills against benchmarks and auto-generates improved variants.

SkillsFramework.description: Core skills framework. Discover, load, and execute skills with a standardized interface.

SkillsRegistry.description: Skill registry. Central catalog of available skills with metadata and capability declarations.

ToolBuilder.description: Tool builder. Scaffold new PakMan tools from spec, with type hints and tests.

ToolRouter.description: Tool router. Selects the right tool for a given intent using semantic matching.

SafetySentry.description: LLM output safety guard. Reviews generated code and content before use.

costs.description: Cost tracking and reporting. Logs per-request token costs and generates spend reports across vendors.

email.description: Email intake integration. Auto-ingest inbound email into projects, epics, and tickets.

telegram.description: Telegram bot integration. Scout pool, chat pool, and report delivery via the Alfred Telegram bot.

PatternMiner.description: Pattern mining engine. Extract design patterns from repos without copying code.

Mutation.description: Mutation engine for package evolution. Combines fragments into package candidates.

SanityFilter.description: Quality gate for package candidates. Filters candidates before development.

SpecGenerator.description: Build spec generator. Creates project specifications from candidates.

Autocoder.description: Code generation from specs. Generates package code automatically.

Bench.description: Evaluation framework for package candidates. Tests and measures fitness.

AgentBazaar.description: Agent discovery marketplace. Browse, register, and compose agents by capability.

ApprovalGate.description: Human-in-the-loop approval gate. Pauses pipelines for human review before proceeding.

AudioBridge.description: Local audio/voice bridge. Transcribe, synthesize, and route audio to AI pipelines.

AutoDistiller.description: Automated model distillation. Trains compact student models from larger teacher outputs.

AutoDocGen.description: Auto documentation generator. Self-documents code and packages from source.

BrowserDriver.description: Browser automation driver. Controls headless browsers for web scraping and vision tasks.

CodeSandbox.description: Isolated code execution sandbox. Run untrusted code safely with WASM isolation.

ContextCompressor.description: Context window compressor. Reduces token usage by summarizing and pruning context mid-flight.

DocumentShredder.description: Document ingestion engine. Parses, chunks, and indexes documents for RAG pipelines.

EnvSyncer.description: Environment secrets syncer. Keeps .env files consistent across services and machines.

FeedbackLoop.description: Reinforcement feedback loop. Collects model outputs, scores them, and feeds back for improvement.

GraphMemory.description: Semantic knowledge graph for AI conversational memory. SQLite-backed, zero runtime deps.

PakManLock.description: Deterministic lockfile manager for PakMan. Pins exact package versions for reproducible installs.

RedTeamer.description: Adversarial red-teaming suite. Generates jailbreak and edge-case prompts to stress-test models.

SemanticCache.description: Semantic response cache. Deduplicates LLM calls by embedding-similarity with configurable threshold.

SwarmProtocol.description: Agent swarm coordination protocol. Negotiates task allocation across a pool of agents.

TerminalObserver.description: Terminal session observer daemon. Monitors shell output and surfaces anomalies to the AI layer.

TokenBank.description: Token budget bank. Allocates, tracks, and enforces per-agent token spend limits.

TraceLog.description: Distributed trace logger. Captures and correlates spans across multi-agent pipelines.

WebHooker.description: Webhook integration hub. Receives, validates, and routes webhook events to AI pipelines.

AnomalyEngine.description: Anomaly detection engine for AI agent behavior and system metrics.

EvaluationEngine.description: Flexible evaluation engine for scoring and comparing model outputs with custom metrics.

LearningTypes.description: Type definitions and schemas for machine learning data pipelines.

MLUtils.description: Shared ML utility helpers: normalization, metrics, and numpy wrappers.

NERExtractor.description: Named-entity recognition extraction pipeline for AI text analysis.

NeuralNetworks.description: Lightweight neural network building blocks and layer abstractions.

NLPPipeline.description: NLP text processing pipeline: tokenization, normalization, and feature extraction.

PredictiveAnalytics.description: Predictive analytics and forecasting utilities for time-series and tabular data.

TicketExecutor.description: Automated ticket executor: runs tasks from the ProjectManager ticket queue.

TrainValidateTest.description: Train/validate/test split utilities and dataset management helpers.

Vision.description: Vision and image processing utilities for multimodal AI pipelines.

ProjManSpec.description: Spec generator for ProjectManager. Turns candidates into buildable build specs via debate loop.
